text: Operational risks stem from Amazon's substantial scale and ongoing investment requirements. The company employs 1.56 million full-time employees, creating significant operational complexity and fixed cost obligations. Research and development expenses totaled $27.166 billion in Q2 2025, representing 16.20% of revenue, indicating continued heavy investment in technology and innovation capabilities. This R&D intensity, while supporting long-term competitiveness, pressures near-term margins and requires sustained revenue growth to justify. The company operates across three segments (North America, International, and AWS) with diverse customer bases including consumers, sellers, developers, enterprises, content creators, and advertisers, creating execution complexity across multiple business models.

Amazon.com, Inc. engages in the retail sale of consumer products and subscriptions through online and physical stores in North America and internationally.
